name: Gotenberg
description: Gotenberg is a developer-friendly, Docker-powered API for converting documents to PDF and taking screenshots. It uses Chromium for HTML/URL/Markdown-to-PDF conversion and screenshots, LibreOffice for Office document conversion, and PDF engines for merging and metadata operations. Gotenberg is self-hosted; replace the base_url with your own instance URL.

auth.note: Gotenberg is self-hosted with no built-in auth. If behind a reverse proxy with auth, add the appropriate Authorization header. The base_url is a placeholder; replace with your instance URL (e.g., 'http://localhost:3000').

capabilities.name: chromium_html_to_pdf
capabilities.description: Convert an HTML file (and optional assets) to a PDF using Chromium.

capabilities.name: chromium_url_to_pdf
capabilities.description: Convert a web page URL to a PDF using Chromium.

capabilities.name: chromium_markdown_to_pdf
capabilities.description: Convert Markdown files to a PDF via an HTML wrapper using Chromium.

capabilities.name: chromium_screenshot_url
capabilities.description: Take a screenshot of a web page URL in PNG, JPEG, or WebP format.

capabilities.name: chromium_screenshot_html
capabilities.description: Take a screenshot of an HTML file in PNG, JPEG, or WebP format.

capabilities.name: chromium_screenshot_markdown
capabilities.description: Take a screenshot of Markdown content in PNG, JPEG, or WebP format.

capabilities.name: libreoffice_convert
capabilities.description: Convert Office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.) to PDF using LibreOffice.

capabilities.name: pdfengines_metadata_write
capabilities.description: Write XMP metadata (Author, Title, Keywords, etc.) to existing PDF files.

capabilities.name: health_get
capabilities.description: Check the health status of the Gotenberg instance and its modules.
